productDisplayName: Reebok Women White Acciomax Sports Shoes
description: Round toed mesh upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for a good shoe structure Has central lace-ups, a reinforced heel collar and a pull loop at the heel Padded fabric inner and tongue Foamy midsole, upraised at the heel TPU outsole with waffle patterned lugs, an arched midfoot and a decoupled heel
